entries.label: HTTP 401 Unauthorized
entries.searchText: http 401 unauthorized the request lacks valid authentication credentials. expired jwt or oauth token authorization header dropped at proxy boundary wrong audience/issuer claims clock skew breaks signed token validation  request lacks valid authentication credentials expired oauth token authorization header dropped proxy boundary wrong

entries.label: HTTP 403 Forbidden
entries.searchText: http 403 forbidden the server understood the request but refuses to authorize it. role lacks required permission waf/security rule blocks source ip csrf protection blocks request filesystem acl denies web process  server understood request refuses authorize role lacks required permission security rule blocks source csrf

entries.label: HTTP 404 Not Found
entries.searchText: http 404 not found the server is reachable, but the url does not map to a resource. deploy changed routes without redirect rules case-sensitive paths differ between environments rewrite rules strip required url segments static files were not published to the target environment  server reachable does resource deploy changed routes without redirect rules case sensitive paths differ

entries.label: HTTP 501 Not Implemented
entries.searchText: http 501 not implemented  unhandled server-side exception upstream service failure runtime configuration issue  unhandled server side exception upstream service failure runtime configuration issue

entries.label: HTTP 502 Bad Gateway
entries.searchText: http 502 bad gateway a gateway/proxy got an invalid response from upstream. upstream crashed mid-response proxy protocol mismatch (http/https) wrong upstream host or port unhealthy load-balancer target  gateway proxy invalid response upstream crashed protocol mismatch https wrong host port unhealthy load

entries.label: HTTP 503 Service Unavailable
entries.searchText: http 503 service unavailable the service is temporarily unable to process requests. autoscaling lag under sudden load database connection pool saturation maintenance flag left enabled circuit breaker open after repeated upstream failures  service temporarily unable process requests autoscaling under sudden load database connection pool saturation maintenance

entries.label: HTTP 504 Gateway Timeout
entries.searchText: http 504 gateway timeout a gateway timed out waiting for upstream response. slow database queries upstream worker deadlocks network latency between edge and origin mismatched timeout values across layers  gateway timed waiting upstream response slow database queries worker deadlocks network latency between edge

entries.label: Cloudflare 520 Unknown Error
entries.searchText: cloudflare 520 unknown error cloudflare reached origin but received an unexpected response. origin process crashes intermittently oversized/invalid response headers firewall intermittently blocks cloudflare ips origin http/2 misconfiguration  cloudflare reached origin received unexpected response process crashes intermittently oversized invalid headers firewall blocks

entries.label: Cloudflare 522 Connection Timed Out
entries.searchText: cloudflare 522 connection timed out cloudflare could not complete tcp handshake to origin in time. origin service down firewall blocks cloudflare edge ranges syn backlog saturation dns points to stale origin ip  cloudflare could complete handshake origin time service down firewall blocks edge ranges backlog saturation

entries.label: Cloudflare 524 A Timeout Occurred
entries.searchText: cloudflare 524 a timeout occurred cloudflare connected to origin but timed out waiting for http response. long uncached queries blocking external api dependency large report generation in request path worker queue congestion  cloudflare connected origin timed waiting response long uncached queries blocking external dependency large report

entries.label: ERR_CERT_COMMON_NAME_INVALID
entries.searchText: err_cert_common_name_invalid tls certificate does not match hostname in url. certificate issued for different domain wildcard does not cover nested hostname cdn/origin serves default certificate stale certificate after renewal err_cert_common_name_invalid certificate does match hostname issued different domain wildcard cover nested origin serves default stale

entries.label: ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED
entries.searchText: err_connection_refused browser could not open a tcp connection to host/port. service crashed or failed to start service bound only to localhost container port not published security group/firewall denies inbound port err_connection_refused browser could open connection host port service crashed failed start bound only localhost container

entries.label: ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED
entries.searchText: err_name_not_resolved browser cannot resolve the hostname to an ip address, so it cannot open a connection. missing a/aaaa/cname for hostname typo in app or browser url nameserver delegation/zone misconfiguration resolver outage or split-horizon mismatch err_name_not_resolved browser cannot resolve hostname address open connection missing aaaa cname typo nameserver delegation zone

entries.label: Nginx 444 No Response
entries.searchText: nginx 444 no response nginx intentionally closes connection without an http response body. server block returns 444 for unknown hosts waf-style deny rule over-matches host/sni mismatch routes to deny block location rule catches valid application paths  nginx intentionally closes connection without response body server block returns unknown hosts style deny

entries.label: Nginx 499 Client Closed Request
entries.searchText: nginx 499 client closed request nginx logged that the client closed the connection first. very slow upstream responses aggressive client timeout settings frontend cancels in-flight requests mobile network instability  nginx logged client closed connection first very slow upstream responses aggressive timeout settings frontend

entries.label: SSL Handshake Failed
entries.searchText: ssl handshake failed tls negotiation failed before any http request/response could be exchanged. client and server share no compatible tls versions/ciphers intermediate certificate missing in served chain wrong certificate served for requested sni hostname mtls required but client certificate missing/invalid  negotiation failed before request response could exchanged client server share compatible versions ciphers intermediate
